title: Product announcement email
response:
Subject: Notely now works offline — for everyone

Hi there,

Ever lost a great idea because the Wi-Fi didn't cooperate? Starting today, Notely works fully offline.

Write, edit, and organize your notes anywhere — on a plane, in the subway, or at that café with the mystery Wi-Fi. The moment you're back online, everything syncs automatically. No manual saving, no "which version is newer?" headaches. Your notes just quietly catch up.

Offline Mode works across both mobile and desktop, so you can jot something down on your phone and pick it up on your laptop later, exactly as you left it.

And here's the part we're most excited about: it's available today for all users, including everyone on the free plan. No upgrade required.

Just open Notely and start writing — Offline Mode is already on.

**[Try Offline Mode →]**

Happy note-taking,
The Notely Team
scoreDetail: completeness: 9/10, tone: 8/10, structure: 9/10, length compliance: 9/10 — All three key points are prominent, the tone is warm with only mild whimsy ('mystery Wi-Fi'), structure has a clear single CTA, and the 145-word count fits the range.
